name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Fish Chunks inGravy 415g
description: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Fish Chunks in Gravy , fully balanced all-natural cat food with fish protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ................................ 6.5% Fat ....................................... 3.5% Crude Ash ............................ 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)......... 0.3% Moisture................................82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives, cereals, fish and fish by-products (4% fish) minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Biotin, Taurine, Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
